globalConfiguration.label: Multi Line Description Test Agent
globalConfiguration.description: Test agent for verifying multi-line description syntax across all supported contexts

systemMessages.message: Welcome! This agent tests multi-line description syntax.
An error occurred. Please try again.

stateVariables.label: Next Topic
stateVariables.description: The next topic to be visited

stateVariables.label: Simple Var
stateVariables.description: Simple single-line description for a variable

stateVariables.label: Complex Var
stateVariables.description:
This variable demonstrates the multi-line description syntax.
It can span multiple lines without needing escape characters.
This is useful for providing detailed context about the variable's purpose.

stateVariables.label: User Context
stateVariables.description:
Stores the current user's context information including:
- User preferences and settings
- Session state and history
- Any custom attributes collected during the conversation

stateVariables.label: Order Status
stateVariables.description:
Tracks the current order status throughout the conversation.
Valid values include: pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled.
This value is updated by various actions in the order_inquiries topic.

nodes.description:
Main entry point for the agent that determines the appropriate topic
based on user input. This topic selector analyzes the user's message
and routes them to the correct specialized topic for handling.

tools.name: go_to_main
tools.description:
Navigate to the main topic when the user has
a general inquiry that doesn't fit specialized topics.

tools.name: go_to_orders
tools.description:
Navigate to order inquiries when the user mentions:
- Order status or tracking
- Shipping questions
- Order modifications or cancellations

nodes.label: Topic Selector
nodes.instructions: You are a topic router. Analyze user input and determine the best topic.

nodes.description: Main topic handling general inquiries and demonstrating action description formats

tools.name: transition_to_orders
tools.description:
Transition to order inquiries when the user's question
relates to their orders, shipping, or purchase history.

nodes.label: Main Topic

actionDefinitions.label: Simple Action
actionDefinitions.description: A simple action with a single-line description

actionDefinitions.label: Complex Action
actionDefinitions.description:
This action demonstrates the multi-line description format.
It can include detailed explanations of what the action does,
when it should be used, and any important considerations.

actionDefinitions.label: Fully Documented Action
actionDefinitions.description:
A comprehensively documented action that showcases
all the multi-line description capabilities.
This includes the action description itself plus
detailed input and output parameter descriptions.

inputType.label: Search Query
inputType.description:
The search query to process.
Should be a natural language question or keyword phrase.
Maximum length is 500 characters.

inputType.label: Context Type
inputType.description:
Specifies the context for the search.
Valid values: "general", "orders", "products", "support".
Defaults to "general" if not specified.

inputType.label: Include History
inputType.description:
When true, includes conversation history in the search context.
This helps provide more relevant results based on prior interactions.

outputType.label: Search Results
outputType.description:
Contains the search results as a structured object.
Includes fields: items (array), total_count (number),
and relevance_scores (array of numbers between 0 and 1).

outputType.label: Success Flag
outputType.description:
Indicates whether the search completed successfully.
Check this before processing search_results.

nodes.description:
Handles all order-related inquiries including:
- Order status and tracking information
- Shipping updates and delivery estimates
- Order modifications and cancellations
- Price adjustments and refund requests
- Missing or damaged items

tools.name: mark_resolved
tools.description:
Complete the interaction when the customer's
order inquiry has been fully resolved.

nodes.label: Order Inquiries

actionDefinitions.label: Get Order Details
actionDefinitions.description:
Retrieves comprehensive order details based on the order ID.
Returns order status, items, shipping info, and pricing.
Requires a valid order ID to be provided.

inputType.label: Order Id
inputType.description:
The unique order identifier.
Must be a positive integer.
Can be found in the order confirmation email.

outputType.label: Order Data
outputType.description:
Complete order information including:
- Order status (pending, shipped, delivered, etc.)
- List of items with quantities and prices
- Shipping address and tracking information
- Payment details and total amount

outputType.label: Can Modify
outputType.description:
Indicates if the order can still be modified.
Orders can only be modified within 60 minutes of placement.

actionDefinitions.label: Cancel Order
actionDefinitions.description:
Attempts to cancel an order if it's still eligible.
Orders can only be cancelled within 60 minutes of placement
and before they enter the processing stage.

inputType.label: Cancellation Reason
inputType.description:
The reason for cancellation.
This helps improve our service and is optional.

outputType.label: Cancellation Success
outputType.description:
True if the order was successfully cancelled.
False if the order could not be cancelled.

outputType.label: Refund Amount
outputType.description:
The amount that will be refunded to the customer.
Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days.

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Assist customers with order-related questions.
Always verify the order ID before taking any actions.
Use get_order_details to retrieve order information.
Only offer cancellation if the order can still be modified.

nodes.description:
Final topic for wrapping up the conversation.
Collects feedback and thanks the customer.
nodes.label: End Interaction

actionDefinitions.label: Collect Feedback
actionDefinitions.description:
Collects customer feedback about their experience.
The feedback is stored for quality improvement purposes.

inputType.label: Rating
inputType.description:
Customer satisfaction rating from 1-5.
1 = Very Dissatisfied, 5 = Very Satisfied.

inputType.label: Comments
inputType.description:
Optional additional comments from the customer.
Can include suggestions or detailed feedback.

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Thank the customer for their interaction and collect feedback.

additionalParameters.system_messages: [{"message": "Welcome! This agent tests multi-line description syntax.", "messageType": "Welcome"}, {"message": "An error occurred. Please try again.", "messageType": "Error"}]
